title: Finite Power Iteration Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite power-iteration bad iterate-coordinate QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact matrix-vector replay computes the second power iterate as [4, 1] while a malformed row claims its first coordinate is 3, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional iterative spectral rows only when they add distinct normalization, residual, deflation, block-iteration, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep convergence rates, spectral-gap assumptions, roundoff, and floating-point eigensolver correctness in Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational matrix, start vector, first two power iterates, normalized finite iterate, Rayleigh quotient, residual vector, and dominant eigenpair shadow as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false second-iterate coordinate through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting coordinate.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces under eigenpair and residual-bound vocabulary.
Keep convergence theorems, spectral-gap assumptions, deflation, block methods, conditioning, roundoff, and floating-point eigensolver stability marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
